top_signals.title: Oil prices pull back on report U.S.-Iran agreement to extend ceasefire awaits Trump approval
top_signals.summary: Oil prices pulled back Thursday, erasing earlier gains on a report that U.S. and Iranian negotiators reached an agreement to extend ceasefire.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Gold Erases Losses After Report of US-Iran Truce Deal
top_signals.summary: Gold erased losses after Axios reported that the US and Iran are on the verge of a deal to extend the ceasefire, pending final approval from US President Donald Trump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Best Buy stock climbs 15% on earnings beat as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales
top_signals.summary: Best Buy reported better-than-expected earnings on Thursday as the company works toward turning around its sales slump.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Goldman's Snider Sees Earnings Driving Stocks Higher
top_signals.summary: Goldman Sachs Chief US Equity Strategist Ben Snider discusses the recent increase in the firm's S&P 500 price target, highlighting strong earnings growth as the primary driver behind the adjustment. Speaking with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest," Snider also says he expects AI gains to broaden out in the market. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: EU to broaden import quotas and tariffs against China
top_signals.summary: Trade defences needed to combat ‘existential’ threat to key sectors, industry commissioner Stéphane Séjourné says
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Fed's Cook says she is prepared to raise rates if inflation doesn't ease - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Fed's Cook says she is prepared to raise rates if inflation doesn't ease  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: China Sells $885 Million of Green Bonds in Hong Kong Debut
top_signals.summary: China priced 6 billion yuan ($885 million) of green sovereign bonds on Thursday, a year after the government’s debut in the international ESG debt market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: HM Treasury: 2026 COVID-19 Cost Tracker update
top_signals.summary: Official Statistics on the cost of measures announced in response to the COVID-19 pandemic and how much the government has spent on these measures so far.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Pope disrupts Silicon Valley
top_signals.summary: Unlike the US president, the pontiff is choosing to grapple with the serious challenges of AI
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EU’s Economic Powers Seek Unity to Push Capital Markets Merger
top_signals.summary: The European Union’s six largest economies are advancing plans for a bloc-wide capital markets union, hoping their collective voice will spur the continent to action after years of delay.

top_signals.title: Tech Mahindra president: UK needs less hesitation, more conviction
top_signals.summary: Tech Mahindra president Arshul Asnani, who returned to London after almost 20 years in Silicon Valley, takes us through his career.
